---
title: "Team"
---

## Project team

- BNFO 420 Capstone Group
- Research focus: microbiome, diet, and cardiometabolic biomarker interactions
- Manuscript status: pre-print draft

## Current responsibilities

- Data integration and quality control
- Exploratory statistical analysis (Q-Q plots, correlation, PCA)
- Modeling (logistic regression with interaction terms)
- Writing and interpretation for manuscript sections

## Workflow conventions

- Pull before starting new edits
- Keep commits focused and descriptive
- Avoid parallel edits to the same `.qmd` file
- Keep data provenance notes updated in `data/README.md`

## Manuscript footer metadata

- Last updated: 2026
- Version: Manuscript v1.0
